title: acer cissifolium
intro: Acer cissifolium, also known as the mountain maple or Japanese maple, is a species of deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Acer cissifolium include reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
